title: Paying SMSF benefits
description: When and how you can pay an SMSF benefit to a member, the types of benefits and your obligations as SMSF trustee.
keywords: SMSF paying benefits, SMSF benefit payment, SMSF preserved, SMSF non-preserved benefits, SMSF unrestricted non-preserved benefits, SMSF conditions of release, superannuation condition of release SMSF, SMSF preservation age

child_links.title: Income stream (pension) rules and payments
child_links.description: SMSF requirements for paying income stream (pension) benefits to members once members have met a condition of release.

child_links.title: PAYG withholding obligations when paying super benefits
child_links.description: SMSF PAYG withholding obligations when paying superannuation benefits to members.

child_links.title: Death of an SMSF member
child_links.description: What trustees need to do when an SMSF member dies, how super death benefits can be paid, and tax on death benefits.
